ValidationRule.description: Only IS can edit Agreement Code
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Name ), NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - Investor Services'), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Investor Services can edit an Agreement Code
